title: chrysanthemum clausonis
intro: Chrysanthemum clausonis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Chrysanthemum clausonis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum clausonis can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule forms, often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
